parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lock_id: $('generate_lock_id').item.json.lock_id, workflow_id: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.workflow_id || 'unknown', workflow_name: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.workflow_name || 'unknown', execution_id: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.execution_id || 'unknown', locked_at: new Date().toISOString(), ttl_seconds: typeof $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.ttl_seconds === 'number' ? $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.ttl_seconds : 86400 }) }}

parameters.errorMessage: =Lock acquisition failed: scope '{{ $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.scope }}' is already held by workflow '{{ $('parse_and_check_lock').item.json.parsed_lock ? $('parse_and_check_lock').item.json.parsed_lock.workflow_name : 'unknown' }}' (id: {{ $('parse_and_check_lock').item.json.parsed_lock ? $('parse_and_check_lock').item.json.parsed_lock.workflow_id : 'unknown' }}, execution: {{ $('parse_and_check_lock').item.json.parsed_lock ? $('parse_and_check_lock').item.json.parsed_lock.execution_id : 'unknown' }}, locked_at: {{ $('parse_and_check_lock').item.json.parsed_lock ? $('parse_and_check_lock').item.json.parsed_lock.locked_at : 'unknown' }})
